name: CMake Artifact Ignore Configuration
description: Ensure the repository root provides a .gitignore listing CMakeFiles/ and CMakeCache.txt.
reason:
题目要求（README.md 207-213 行）：**IMPORTANT**: Create a `.gitignore` file in your project root directory to avoid OJ evaluation conflicts. The `.gitignore` file should include at least the following entries:

```gitignore
CMakeFiles/
CMakeCache.txt
```

name: Overall Project Readability and Organization Structure
description: Assess overall project readability, code organization, and structure clarity.
